ai-w4-t1.answer: AI-assisted debugging: you reproduce the bug, paste evidence, AI suggests causes. You verify — never merge blind.
ai-w4-t1.realWorld: Stack trace + 10 lines of code → hypothesis list → test each.

ai-w4-t2.answer: Stack trace reads bottom-up. Top = where it crashed. **Caused by** = root. Your code appears with file:line.
ai-w4-t2.realWorld: Exception at Service.java:45, caused by NullPointer at User.java:12 — fix line 12 first.

ai-w4-t3.answer: Ask AI to explain exceptions in plain English: NPE, ArrayIndexOutOfBounds, NumberFormat. Map to your line of code.
ai-w4-t3.realWorld: 'NPE at getName()' → object was null before method call.

ai-w4-t4.answer: Refactor prompts: 'Extract duplicate logic, keep behavior.' Small steps + run after each.
ai-w4-t4.realWorld: Duplicate if-blocks in switch cases → shared helper method.

ai-w4-t5.answer: AI generates JavaDoc from signatures. Review @param names and descriptions — often wrong on complex types.
ai-w4-t5.realWorld: Multi-line JavaDoc on public API — first draft from AI, accuracy from you.

ai-w4-t6.answer: Code review via AI: ask for bugs, not style only. Cross-check with your own read — AI misses logic errors.
ai-w4-t6.realWorld: AI misses off-by-one; you catch it in manual review — both layers matter.

ai-w4-t7.answer: Ask for unit test **ideas**, not full suites. You implement — tests teach the code.
ai-w4-t7.realWorld: Method parseDate — AI lists null, empty, invalid format, leap year.

ai-w4-t8.answer: AI can't run your code or see production data. Heisenbugs and race conditions need logs and debugger, not chat alone.
ai-w4-t8.realWorld: Intermittent failure — AI guesses; you add logging and reproduce.
